title: pelargonium × myrtillum
intro: Pelargonium × myrtillum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Rose Geranium contain compounds like geraniol and linalool, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin problems. Rose Geranium can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, and is often used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
